name: Yakitori Ando
tagline: Tiny Kaimuki izakaya serving omakase-only yakitori over binchotan charcoal — Oahu's best-kept dining secret.
parking: Street parking on Center St and Waialae Ave
talkStory: With only a handful of counter seats, Chef Ando grills each skewer over binchotan charcoal with Tokyo-level precision — chicken hearts, tsukune with runny egg yolk, and seasonal specials. The omakase-only format means you sit back and trust the chef. Book 3-4 weeks in advance; locals consider this the best-kept dining secret on Oahu. The intimate counter experience takes about 90 minutes and is unforgettable.
